function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the 2026-01-19 invoice here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft was written successfully. Verification: attachment path matches a file I read; single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first; recipient matches Claudia canonical email; subject quoting is valid. Next complete cleanup by deleting the processed inbox item, which I have already read and completed.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md addressed to claudia@helios-tax.example with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, verified sender and invoice, created outbound draft, and deleted inbox file. Ready to report with grounded refs only from files read this run.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the resend request workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing an outbound email draft to Claudia Reiter with the requested 2026-01-19 Helios invoice attached, then removed the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system before task work, treated inbox metadata as canonical for sender identity, verified recipient via entity primary_contact_email, used outbox email workflow, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resending the 2026-01-19 invoice. Claudia's canonical entity record in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms the sender address claudia@helios-tax.example. The exact requested invoice is documented in 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md, so the request could be completed from canonical evidence.
